steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject is the gerund phrase 'Having proportionally large populations.' Even though the phrase contains the plural noun 'populations,' the whole gerund phrase functions as a singular subject.

steps.title: Choose singular agreement
steps.content: A, C, and D are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular gerund subject. The singular present-tense verb fits the sentence. The answer is B.
